skill.name: seedance
skill.description: Create structured Chinese prompts for Seedance 2.0 video generation, including references, shot timing, camera movement, audio, and extension workflows.
skill.summary: Generate Seedance 2.0 video prompts for short videos, ads, story scenes, and multimodal references.
skill.author: songguoxs

security_audit.summary: Reviewed SKILL.md as an untrusted community skill and found only Markdown guidance for Seedance 2.0 prompt writing. The external command detections are false positives from Markdown backticks, code fences, and @reference examples, not executable shell or Ruby code. The weak crypto and entropy detections are false positives from frontmatter text and dense Chinese examples; no prompt injection, exfiltration, network access, filesystem access, or credential handling evidence was found.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Markdown Backticks Flagged as External Commands
low_findings.description: The repeated external_commands findings point to Markdown inline literals and fenced prompt examples. These lines describe Seedance @references and output formats; they do not invoke a shell, Ruby backticks, subprocesses, or user-controlled command execution.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The cited content is visible Markdown documentation and prompt text, not executable source code. No command interpreter, script file, or runtime call is present in SKILL.md.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Weak Cryptographic Algorithm Match
low_findings.description: The weak cryptographic algorithm finding at the frontmatter description is not supported by context. The line only describes when to use the Seedance video prompt skill and contains no hashing, encryption, cipher selection, or cryptographic API use.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 3 is a natural-language description field. I found no cryptographic operation or algorithm reference in that location.

low_findings.title: False Positive: Entropy Heuristics from Chinese Prompt Text
low_findings.description: The high entropy findings appear to come from long, dense Chinese video prompt examples and multilingual Markdown content. No encoded payload, binary blob, decompression routine, decoder, or hidden executable content was found.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The specific high-entropy line is a readable Chinese cinematic prompt example. The file is a Markdown document with normal text structure, so entropy alone is not evidence of obfuscation here.

content.value_statement: Seedance users need detailed prompts that control shots, timing, references, and audio. This skill turns video ideas into structured Chinese prompts for short clips, ads, stories, and multimodal workflows.
actual_capabilities: Writes Chinese Seedance 2.0 prompts with subject, action, scene, camera movement, lighting, and style details.
Uses official @图片, @视频, and @音频 reference naming for multimodal prompt workflows.
Creates prompt structures for text-only generation, reference consistency, video editing, and video extension.
Breaks videos longer than 15 seconds into connected segments with extension instructions.
Adds timing, dialogue, sound effects, aspect ratio, frame rate, and negative constraints when useful.
Provides multiple creative prompt versions when the user wants options.
limitations: It writes prompts only; it does not call Seedance or generate video files.
It is optimized for Chinese Seedance prompts and may need adaptation for other video models.
It cannot verify uploaded media quality, platform availability, or final generation results.
It warns against realistic human face uploads but cannot enforce platform safety rules.

use_cases.title: Plan Product Ad Videos
use_cases.description: Create concise product showcase prompts with camera movement, material details, sound, and brand presentation.

use_cases.title: Draft Short Drama Scenes
use_cases.description: Turn a story beat into timed shots with dialogue, actor emotion, sound effects, and scene transitions.

use_cases.title: Use Reference Media Correctly
use_cases.description: Map images, videos, and audio files to Seedance @references with clear roles for each asset.

prompt_templates.title: Basic Video Prompt
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner request for one short clip.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a Chinese Seedance 2.0 prompt for a [duration] video about [subject]. Use [aspect ratio] and a [mood] visual style.

prompt_templates.title: Reference Image Prompt
prompt_templates.scenario: Use one or more uploaded images for consistency.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a Seedance prompt using @图片1 as [character or product] and @图片2 as [scene]. Include camera movement, lighting, and audio.

prompt_templates.title: Timed Story Prompt
prompt_templates.scenario: Build a 15 second scene with precise timing.
prompt_templates.prompt: Write a 15 second Seedance prompt for [story]. Split it into 0-5, 6-10, and 11-15 second sections with dialogue and sound effects.

prompt_templates.title: Multisegment Extension Plan
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow for videos longer than 15 seconds.
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [total duration] Seedance plan for [concept]. Split it into 15 second segments and define each segment connection point for video extension.

output_examples.input: A 10 second vertical drink advertisement with one product image.
output_examples.output: A Chinese prompt that uses @图片1 as the product reference, specifies vertical framing, describes a rotating product reveal, adds ice and condensation details, and includes upbeat sound design.
A two-part plan with a normal first 15 second prompt, a second 15 second video extension prompt, and a clear ending frame for continuity.

output_examples.input: A short drama scene with dialogue and a tense ending.
output_examples.output: A timed Chinese scene prompt with character actions, emotional dialogue labels, camera close-ups, ambient sound, and a final suspense beat.

best_practices: Provide duration, aspect ratio, reference files, and the main visual goal before asking for the prompt.
Use official @图片, @视频, and @音频 labels so each reference has a clear purpose.
Ask for timed sections when the video is 13 to 15 seconds or has important story beats.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a vague mood-only prompt without subject, action, or scene details.
Do not mix reference images, videos, and audio without explaining what each file should control.
Do not request realistic human face uploads when the target platform blocks those materials.

faq.question: Does this skill generate videos directly?
faq.answer: No. It creates prompts and workflow plans for Seedance 2.0, but it does not render or upload videos.

faq.question: What language does it use for prompts?
faq.answer: It is designed to write Seedance prompts in Chinese, matching the guidance in the skill.

faq.question: Can it use image, video, and audio references?
faq.answer: Yes. It can describe how to use @图片, @视频, and @音频 references in a prompt.

faq.question: Can it help with videos longer than 15 seconds?
faq.answer: Yes. It can split longer ideas into connected segments and use video extension prompts.

faq.question: Is it useful for product ads?
faq.answer: Yes. It includes patterns for product rotation, material details, lighting, sound, and commercial presentation.

faq.question: What should I provide before using it?
faq.answer: Provide the topic, duration, aspect ratio, available references, and the intended style or audience.
